name: blur-text
title: Blur Text
description: Characters or words animate in from blur with staggered timing.
docs:
# Blur Text
Characters or words animate in from blur with staggered timing.
## Import
```tsx
import { BlurText } from "@/components/ui/blur-text";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<BlurText text="Beautiful motion" delay={50} animateBy="chars" direction="top" />
```
## Props
- **text** (string) — default: `"Beautiful motion"`: Text
- **delay** (number) — default: `50`: Stagger (ms)
- **animateBy** (string) — default: `"chars"`: Animate by
- **direction** (string) — default: `"top"`: Direction
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx --yes github:Rydaguy101/aurora-ui add blur-text
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/blur-text
```
